---
title:  
    "Phylogenetics analysis for EXPIII"
date: 
    "Jan 23rd, 2024"
author:  
    "Ali Movasati"  
output:  
    html_document:
        #css: style.css
        toc: true
        toc_depth: 2
        toc_float: true
        number_sections: true
        theme: lumen
        highlight: zenburn
        code_folding: hide
        code_download: true # to make the Rmd source code available
---

```{css, echo=F}

#TOC {
  position: fixed;
  left: 0;
  top: 0;
  width: 250px;
  height: 100%;
  overflow:auto;
}

body, td {
  font-family: sans-serif;
  background-color: white;
  font-size: 16px;
}


h1, .h1, h2, .h2, h3, .h3 {
    margin-top: 30px;
}


p.caption {
  font-size: 0.9em;
  font-style: italic;
  color: grey;
  margin-right: 10%;
  margin-left: 10%;  
  text-align: justify;
}


/* scrollable code chunks, limit code chunk window height */

pre {
  max-height: 600px;
  overflow-y: auto;
}

pre[class] {
  max-height: 300px;
}


/* scrollable output of code chunks */
/* add class.output="scroll-100" to code chunks */

.scroll-100 {
  max-height: 300px;
  overflow-y: auto;
  background-color: inherit;
}
```



```{r setting global code chunk parameters, include=FALSE}

# options for code chunk and output inclusion 
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  message = FALSE, echo = TRUE, warning=FALSE, results = "hide"
)

# options for figures
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  fig.width = 8, fig.height = 8, fig.align = "center"
)


# options(scipen=999)

# margin of plotly
m <- list(
  l = 150,
  r = 150,
  b = 100,
  t = 100,
  pad = 4
)


```




# Introduction




```{r loading libraries, echo=FALSE}

# loading libraries
library("ggplot2")
library("plotly")
library("DT")
library("dplyr")
library("tidyr")
library("Biostrings")
library("stringr")
library("magrittr")
library("ape")


```




```{r read-in the data}

# read in the data
variants_ann <- read.table(file = "/Users/alimos313/Documents/studies/phd/hpc-research/genome-evo-proj/results/tables/2-p/all_annotated_variants.tsv.gz", 
sep = "\t", stringsAsFactors = FALSE, header = TRUE)

str(variants_ann)

# correct for the switched experimental lines
variants_ann$exp_line[variants_ann$exp_line == 15 & variants_ann$passage > 360] <- "A"
variants_ann$exp_line[variants_ann$exp_line == 16 & variants_ann$passage > 360] <- "B"

variants_ann$exp_line[variants_ann$exp_line == "A"] <- "16"
variants_ann$exp_line[variants_ann$exp_line == "B"] <- "15"


# only keep the EXPIII data

variants_ann_expiii <- variants_ann[variants_ann$exp_line %in% 13:16,]


# format the dataframe
variants_ann_expiii <- variants_ann_expiii %>%
                              mutate(host_line = ifelse(exp_line %in% c("13", "14"), "MT2", "MT4"), # set host cell line info
                                exp_line = case_when(exp_line==13 ~ "MT2_1", exp_line==14 ~ "MT2_2", exp_line==15 ~ "MT4_1", exp_line==16 ~ "MT4_2"), # update exp line labels
                                mut_info = paste(genomic_pos, ref_allele, alt_allele, sep = "_")) # add a field containing pos, ref, and alt info of muts

# remove duplicate records for the same variants
variants_expiii <- variants_ann_expiii %>% filter(!duplicated(variant_id))


# last passage 

end_passage <- 560

```



# Overview {.tabset .tabset-pills}


```{r}

phymltest(seqfile = "/Users/alimos313/Documents/studies/phd/hpc-research/genome-evo-proj/src/r-processing-scripts/phylogenetics/test1/test1.txt", execname = "/Users/alimos313/miniconda3/envs/ha_proj/bin/phyml")

```
